# ResumeSpy

> ResumeSpy is a free, open-source resume builder for modern professionals.
> It combines a Markdown editor, full version history, AI tailoring to any
> job description, and native multilingual support for English, Chinese
> (中文), and Japanese (日本語).

ResumeSpy is built and maintained by Fei-Fei Jin. The project is open source
and free to use. Live site: https://resumespy.feifeijin.com/
Source code: https://github.com/feifeijin/ResumeSpyWeb

## Key facts

- Free and open source
- AI-powered resume tailoring to any job description
- Full version control (every save is a recoverable version)
- Multilingual: English, Chinese (Simplified), Japanese
- Markdown-based editor → clean PDF export → ATS-friendly
- Web app, runs in any modern browser
- No password — magic-link sign-in
- Privacy-respecting: no data sale, deletion on request

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://resumespy.feifeijin.com/): product overview
- [FAQ](https://resumespy.feifeijin.com/faq): common questions and answers
- [Articles](https://resumespy.feifeijin.com/articles): index of all guides
